scripts.dev: npm run build && concurrently -k -s first -n renderer,electron "npm run dev:renderer" "npm run dev:electron"
scripts.pack: npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --dir --publish never
scripts.dist:linux: npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --linux --x64 --publish never
scripts.dist:mac: npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --mac --x64 --arm64 --publish never
scripts.dist:win: npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --win --x64 --publish never
